'''鈭歱-n-dh-sh''' ('''kapandheshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xenograft|xenograft]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-n-dh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xenograft|xenograft]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-n-dh-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kapandheshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipandheshoko|thipandheshoko]] || [[word:jipandheshoko|jipandheshoko]] || [[word:shipandheshoko|shipandheshoko]] || [[word:kipandheshoko|kipandheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupandheshoko|thuthupandheshoko]] || [[word:jujupandheshoko|jujupandheshoko]] || [[word:shushupandheshoko|shushupandheshoko]] || [[word:kukupandheshoko|kukupandheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupandheshoko|thupandheshoko]] || [[word:jupandheshoko|jupandheshoko]] || [[word:shupandheshoko|shupandheshoko]] || [[word:kupandheshoko|kupandheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupandheshoko|thupandheshoko]] || [[word:jupandheshoko|jupandheshoko]] || [[word:shupandheshoko|shupandheshoko]] || [[word:kupandheshoko|kupandheshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepandheshoko|thepandheshoko]] || [[word:jepandheshoko|jepandheshoko]] || [[word:shepandheshoko|shepandheshoko]] || [[word:kepandheshoko|kepandheshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopandheshoko|thothopandheshoko]] || [[word:jojopandheshoko|jojopandheshoko]] || [[word:shoshopandheshoko|shoshopandheshoko]] || [[word:kokopandheshoko|kokopandheshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopandheshoko|thopandheshoko]] || [[word:jopandheshoko|jopandheshoko]] || [[word:shopandheshoko|shopandheshoko]] || [[word:kopandheshoko|kopandheshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopandheshoko|thopandheshoko]] || [[word:jopandheshoko|jopandheshoko]] || [[word:shopandheshoko|shopandheshoko]] || [[word:kopandheshoko|kopandheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙pandheshoko|th忙pandheshoko]] || [[word:j忙pandheshoko|j忙pandheshoko]] || [[word:sh忙pandheshoko|sh忙pandheshoko]] || [[word:k忙pandheshoko|k忙pandheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapandheshoko|thathapandheshoko]] || [[word:jajapandheshoko|jajapandheshoko]] || [[word:shashapandheshoko|shashapandheshoko]] || [[word:kakapandheshoko|kakapandheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapandheshoko|thapandheshoko]] || [[word:japandheshoko|japandheshoko]] || [[word:shapandheshoko|shapandheshoko]] || [[word:kapandheshoko|kapandheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapandheshoko|thapandheshoko]] || [[word:japandheshoko|japandheshoko]] || [[word:shapandheshoko|shapandheshoko]] || [[word:kapandheshoko|kapandheshoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shapandheshithi|shapandheshithi]] || [[word:shapandheshiji|shapandheshiji]] || [[word:shapandheshishi|shapandheshishi]] || [[word:shapandheshiki|shapandheshiki]]
